creator: rnsanchez@wait4.org
text:
On Sun, 3 Jun 2007 01:56:44 GMT
Charles <landemaine@gmail.com> wrote:

> I installed the FreeBSD bootloader to load FreeBSD and Windows. Every time
> the bootloader screen shows up, it beeps. I used to use Grub, and Grub
> doesn't have this problem. Actually GAG doesn't either. It's particularly
> annoying when you start your computer in the classroom, or late at home
> when everybody sleeps next to you.

Please provide additional info, like a complete 'dmesg' output and 'uname -a'.
